refactorspaces.service.CfnAbout:
Creates an AWS Migration Hub Refactor Spaces service. The account owner of the service is always the environment owner, regardless of which account in the environment creates the service. Services have either a URL endpoint in a virtual private cloud (VPC), or a Lambda function endpoint.

**Important**  
If an AWS resource is launched in a service VPC, and you want it to be accessible to all of an environment’s services with VPCs and routes, apply the `RefactorSpacesSecurityGroup` to the resource. Alternatively, to add more cross-account constraints, apply your own security group.

refactorspaces.service.ApplicationIdenti.Description: The unique identifier of the application.

refactorspaces.service.EndpointType.Description: The endpoint type of the service.

refactorspaces.service.EnvironmentIdenti.Description: The unique identifier of the environment.

refactorspaces.service.LambdaEndpoint.Description: A summary of the configuration for the AWS Lambda endpoint type.

refactorspaces.service.Tags.Description: The tags assigned to the service.

refactorspaces.service.UrlEndpoint.Description: The summary of the configuration for the URL endpoint type.

refactorspaces.service.VpcId.Description: The ID of the virtual private cloud (VPC).
